name: NextGen Mold Technologies
message: NextGen Mold Technologies specializes in the injection mold industry, providing services such as feasibility studies, design, mold maintenance, engineering changes, and new tooling. The company is committed to delivering quick and effective results while exceeding customer expectations. With significant investment in technology and a dedicated team, NextGen has established a strong reputation for precision and timely delivery. Their intended clients include a range of partners seeking innovative solutions and high-quality service in mold manufacturing.
